safety_use_cases.label: Ergonomic overreach/improper bend monitoring at CRFM
safety_use_cases.description: They are seeing many overreach and improper bend events on the CRFM I-dozens of camera and want to validate sensitivity and review the footage.

evidence.quote: So we saw a lot of them in CRFM, both overreach and improper bend.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Bennett <fake.kendall.bennett@foundryharbormanufacturing.com>

evidence.quote: I'm not sure that those are actually overreaching.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Bennett <fake.kendall.bennett@foundryharbormanufacturing.com>

evidence.quote: Let's go overreach.
evidence.speaker: Briar Langley <fake.briar.langley@foundryharbormanufacturing.com>

evidence.quote: The 38, I-dozens of camera.
evidence.speaker: Briar Langley <fake.briar.langley@foundryharbormanufacturing.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Heatmaps to locate ergonomic hotspots and adjust workflow
safety_use_cases.description: Use embedded heat maps to pinpoint where overreaching occurs and explore changes to tote loading/stacking to reduce risk.

evidence.quote: we have heat maps now embedded here.
evidence.speaker: Shawn Abbott <fake.shawn.abbott@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: So this is sort of the, this is the hotspot right here.
evidence.speaker: Shawn Abbott <fake.shawn.abbott@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: That's something we can look at as far as maybe they're loading too many in there.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Bennett <fake.kendall.bennett@foundryharbormanufacturing.com>

evidence.quote: Yeah, it looks like it's going to be to overreach to set them down in the middle.
evidence.speaker: Briar Langley <fake.briar.langley@foundryharbormanufacturing.com>

evidence.quote: Reaching over the top, taking it out of an empty, or taking it out of one, and putting it into one that's, yeah.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Bennett <fake.kendall.bennett@foundryharbormanufacturing.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Change impact markers after lowering rack at Headliners
safety_use_cases.description: After lowering a rack, they want a timeline marker across reports to measure the effect on overreaching and improper bending.

evidence.quote: We lowered a rack at Headliners on the 21st of March.
evidence.speaker: Briar Langley <fake.briar.langley@foundryharbormanufacturing.com>

evidence.quote: And so we've already seen a pretty big reduction there, but I was wondering if we could get a marker thrown in.
evidence.speaker: Briar Langley <fake.briar.langley@foundryharbormanufacturing.com>

evidence.quote: Maybe all of them, just because some of that may, the change in the racks may actually reduce some of the improper bending, too.
evidence.speaker: Briar Langley <fake.briar.langley@foundryharbormanufacturing.com>

evidence.quote: You should see that on your side now for any reports that you run on the headliner camera.
evidence.speaker: Shawn Abbott <fake.shawn.abbott@voxelai.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Obstruction detection tuning due to false positives
safety_use_cases.description: They disabled obstruction detections because the system was misidentifying a rug, indicating a need to tune or adjust the feature.

evidence.quote: Dropped the obstructions because I found it kept just randomly picking up a rug.
evidence.speaker: Briar Langley <fake.briar.langley@foundryharbormanufacturing.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Assign and track safety follow-ups with Actions
safety_use_cases.description: Use the Actions workflow to assign owners, subscribers, and due dates for safety-related process changes like revisiting tote loading.

evidence.quote: I wanted to walk you guys through this new Actions workflow that we released.
evidence.speaker: Shawn Abbott <fake.shawn.abbott@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: let's just put sort of revisit process for loading totes.
evidence.speaker: Shawn Abbott <fake.shawn.abbott@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: I could add you as a subscriber.
evidence.speaker: Shawn Abbott <fake.shawn.abbott@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: I could put a due date here.
evidence.speaker: Shawn Abbott <fake.shawn.abbott@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: So when I click on this and I go to the Action page, it says Revisit Process for Loading Totes, is there a, how do you close it?
evidence.speaker: Kendall Bennett <fake.kendall.bennett@foundryharbormanufacturing.com>

evidence.quote: and then you can mark it as complete.
evidence.speaker: Shawn Abbott <fake.shawn.abbott@voxelai.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Shift-segmented safety dashboards and gamification
safety_use_cases.description: Create boards by shift covering all events and cameras to compare safety performance and enable weekly/monthly rewards.

evidence.quote: Do you guys have any more progress on kind of breaking up a dashboard by shift?
evidence.speaker: Briar Langley <fake.briar.langley@foundryharbormanufacturing.com>

evidence.quote: So would you want something initially, just three boards with all of the events, all of the cameras for each shift?
evidence.speaker: Shawn Abbott <fake.shawn.abbott@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: we can include shifts, and this is a way to segment the data now.
evidence.speaker: Shawn Abbott <fake.shawn.abbott@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: Yes, that would be the idea, and we can kind of gamify it and find a reward system. Weekly, and then probably monthly.
evidence.speaker: Briar Langley <fake.briar.langley@foundryharbormanufacturing.com>
